assignments.name: input_summary
assignments.value: ={{ 'maize price summary | entries: ' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.count + ' | sources: ' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.source_list }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'FarmGateIQ — Maize price summary ready for approval (' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.data_confidence + ' confidence)' }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

A maize price summary has been generated and is awaiting your approval before any farmer broadcast.

' + '

' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.summary_text + '

' + '

Basis
Entries used: ' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.count + '
Source types: ' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.source_list + '
Outliers flagged: ' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.outlier_count + '
Data confidence: ' + $('Parse summary output').all()[0].json.data_confidence + '

' + '

Open the approvals tab in FarmGateIQ Demo to approve, edit, or reject this summary.

' }}

options.responseData: {"status":"started","note":"WF-003 price summary is running; the farmer_update row will appear in the approvals tab shortly."}
